Okay, the next script is called the Star Story Solutions Script.
I learned this initially from a guy named Vince James, and he taught me that every good sales letter has this process, the Star Story and Solution.
I remember learning that, I got really excited and I started trying to write copy, but it was hard just having those three pieces and how did it all work.
So I spent the next eight or nine years writing copy and studying copy and getting good copy written for me, and about a year ago I went through and looked at all these sales letters, all these pieces, everything we had created, and I tried to find the commonalities between them, and break down the Star Story solution into a script that really identifies all of the pieces.
And so, as you'll see down below, here are the scripts, this is the Star section of the script, and here are the pieces you need to take somebody through to do the Star part of the script.
Next, you've got the story, and this is the structure we use for a successful story, and then last is the solution.
Here's the structure we use for the solution.
Now, anytime I'm writing any kind of sales video or sales letter, I break out the Star Story Solution script.
I print it out, I have it there next to me, and I start filling in the blanks, and I just go through, and by the time it's done, I got a killer sales script, and I can go back in, tie in all the inception secrets ideas that you learned earlier, and boom, that's what we need to have a killer sales letter.
